jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at BD India
jsonLd.description:
BD India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
